title: Goniopteris paucipinnata
taxonomy: Goniopteris paucipinnata is classified within the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the class Polypodiopsida, which is a group of vascular plants also known as polypod ferns. The order is Polypodiales and the subclass is Polypodiidae. This classification places Goniopteris paucipinnata within the division Pteridophyta, which comprises vascular plants with fern-like leaves. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of Goniopteris paucipinnata within the plant kingdom.
